title: Puerto Banus Yacht Rental for a Hen Do: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Organising a hen do in Puerto Banus means choosing a yacht charter from the glamorous marina at the heart of the Costa del Sol. Expect to pay from EUR 1,500 for a half-day crewed boat for ten guests, and you can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to secure the best vessel for your party.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus for a hen do?

The price of a private yacht for a hen party in Puerto Banus typically ranges from EUR 1,500 to EUR 4,000 for a half-day charter. Costs depend on the vessel size, duration, and whether crew, catering, and drinks are included. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

  • Shared sunset tour (2 hours): from EUR 80 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (6 guests): from EUR 600 total
  • Catamaran full-day (12 guests): from EUR 2,500 total
  • Luxury crewed yacht half-day (10 guests): from EUR 1,800 total

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

All charters depart from the main Puerto Banus marina in Marbella, a purpose-built complex with dozens of berths and chandlers. Nearby La Bajadilla harbour in Marbella town also offers fishing boat charters. For longer itineraries, you can head west to Estepona harbour or east to Cabopino marina. The bay of Marbella and the shoreline of San Pedro Alcantara are popular cruising grounds. A typical route heads south-west towards the Gibraltar strait.

Which boat to rent for a hen party?

The choice of boat affects the vibe, cost, and number of guests you can host. Below are the main options for a Puerto Banus hen do.

  1. Axopar 28, best for a sporty, fast group of up to 9 guests; from EUR 900 half-day.
  2. Fairline Phantom 40, ideal for a stylish day out with 8 guests; from EUR 1,600 half-day.
  3. Lagoon 450 catamaran, perfect for a spacious, stable party of 12; from EUR 2,800 full-day.
  4. Azimut 55 Flybridge, a luxury option for 10 guests with sun deck and cabins; from EUR 2,500 half-day. For a smaller, faster choice, compare this speedboat which can also be found on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to drive a boat in Puerto Banus?

You do not need a boating licence in Spain if you hire a fully crewed yacht; the skipper holds the necessary qualifications. For bareboat rental without a captain, you must hold a valid ICC (International Certificate of Competence) or a Spanish recreational licence. BoatHire24 operators confirm exact requirements at booking.

Book an early-morning departure in July or August to anchor in the calmer lee of the Sierra Blanca; the afternoon Levante wind can make the Alboran Sea choppy.

What is the best season for a hen do in Puerto Banus?

The peak season runs from June through September, with July and August seeing the hottest temperatures and busiest marinas. Spring (April to May) and autumn (October) offer milder weather and lower rates. The local Poniente wind brings clear skies, while the Levante can build afternoon swells.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 80, 4,000 per booking
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 6 to 12 guests
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance: 15 nautical miles from Puerto Banus to Marbella bay

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can we bring our own food and drink on a chartered yacht?

Most crewed charters allow you to bring your own catering, although many operators offer premium catering packages as an option.

Is there a deposit required for a hen party boat hire?

A security deposit of typically EUR 500 to EUR 2,000 is held on a credit card and refunded fully after the trip, provided there is no damage.

What happens if the weather is bad on our hen do day?

The captain decides whether to sail or reschedule; if it is unsafe, you will be offered a full refund or alternative date with no penalty.

Can we swim from the boat during the charter?

Yes, most itineraries include stops at quiet coves or anchor points where the boat can be anchored for swimming and snorkelling.

Exploring the Costa del Sol by boat is a memorable way to celebrate a hen party, and you can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24 to find the perfect vessel. If you own a boat in Puerto Banus, you can list a boat for free and earn from the growing demand for hen party charters in 2026.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
